generated_oml:
// ------------------ Sensing Components ------------------
instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing the gantry crane's physical state such as position and ancillary readings"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CranePositionDataTransmitted
]

instance AirQualitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Indoor air‑quality sensor set mounted on a Raspberry‑Pi for the Air Quality Management exemplar"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityDataTransmitted
]

// ------------------ Data Transmitted ------------------
instance CranePositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor
]

instance AirQualityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirQualitySensor
]

// ------------------ Data Instances ------------------
instance CranePositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Continuous time‑series of crane position and sensor readings ingested by the Logging Application"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, SimulationEngine, ValidationEngine
]

instance AirQualityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live indoor air‑quality measurements streamed from the Raspberry‑Pi sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirQualityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDB, PredictionEngine, GrafanaDashboard
]

instance HistoricalCraneData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Persisted historical operational parameters stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance PredictedCraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated future crane states generated by the SimulationEngine"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]

instance PredictedAirQualityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Forecasted indoor air‑quality metrics produced by the PredictionEngine"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirQualityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictionEngine
]

// ------------------ Models ------------------
instance CraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD geometry of the gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion 360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEngine, SimulationEngine
]

instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model of the crane built with the Capella modelling tool"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEngine, SimulationEngine
]

instance AirQualityAutomationMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML representation of the indoor air‑quality system used by the Azure‑hosted twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictionEngine
]

instance GreenhouseBehaviourAdaptationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioural adaptation model used by GreenhouseDT to adjust its twin based on observed data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DockerRuntime
]

// ------------------ Enablers ------------------
instance DockerRuntime : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker container runtime orchestrating all twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalCraneControlService,
                     HistoricalLoggingService,
                     CraneStateVisualizationService,
                     ContinuousValidationService,
                     RuntimeVisualizationService,
                     SimulationService,
                     PredictionService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB instance storing continuous crane sensor logs"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalLoggingService
]

instance InfluxDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "InfluxDB database used by GreenhouseDT and the air‑quality exemplar for time‑series storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker handling runtime communication between physical and digital components"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalCraneControlService,
                     ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboards visualising live sensor streams and historical trends"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneStateVisualizationService,
                     RuntimeVisualizationService
]

instance SimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine consuming crane data and models to generate future states"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance PredictionEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Prediction service forecasting indoor air‑quality based on sensor streams"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictionService
]

instance ValidationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Continuous validation component comparing live sensor data with CAD and kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance ControlOptimizationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Engine executing optimal motion planning for the crane"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalCraneControlService
]

// ------------------ Services ------------------
instance OptimalCraneControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing optimal control of crane motions"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizeCraneMotionAction
]

instance HistoricalLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service continuously logging historical operational parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance CraneStateVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service visualising the crane state and performance in real time"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneStateInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service continuously validating live sensor data against CAD and kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustCraneControlAction
]

instance RuntimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Runtime visualisation service for indoor air‑quality sensor streams"
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityVisualizationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing dynamic simulations of the crane system"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationOutcomeInsight
]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service predicting future indoor air‑quality conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityForecastInsight
]

// ------------------ Actions ------------------
instance OptimizeCraneMotionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically compute and apply optimal crane motion trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustCraneControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust crane control parameters based on validation results"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// ------------------ Insights ------------------
instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from long‑term logged operational data"
]

instance CraneStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time visual insight into crane position, speed and load"
]

instance AirQualityVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live visual representation of indoor air‑quality metrics"
]

instance SimulationOutcomeInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into predicted future crane dynamics produced by simulation"
]

instance AirQualityForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted indoor air‑quality metrics supporting preventive actions"
]

// ------------------ Physical Components ------------------
instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Interface capturing physical crane state and forwarding it to the Logging Application"
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program that ingests sensor streams and writes them continuously into TimescaleDB"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands are issued by the Control Application, a Python program that uses the Physical Crane Interface to communicate with the crane’s controllers. The document states that the Control Application “uses the crane interface to control the crane,” implying that command messages (e.g., motion set‑points) are sent from the digital‑twin side to the physical hardware. Details such as command formatting, validation, authentication, or acknowledgment mechanisms are not provided."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The lab‑scale gantry crane digital twin adopts an ad‑hoc architectural style rather than a commercial DT framework. Its software components are modelled with the C4 method and are packaged as Docker containers (e.g., database, MQTT broker, dashboard) to enable easy deployment via virtualization/containerisation. Coordination among components is performed by custom services written for the exemplar, with no explicit orchestration platform described."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑service communication within the digital twin relies on an MQTT broker for signaling between the Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service, and other components. Services also access the TimescaleDB database directly (presumably over a standard database client) and the Grafana Dashboard reads from this database. The document does not detail network topology, bandwidth, latency, redundancy, or security protocols beyond the use of MQTT for messaging."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All software components of the digital twin (Database, MQTT broker, Logging Application, Control Application, Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, Continuous Validation Service, Dashboard, and Human‑Machine Interface) are intended to run on a single personal computer. The components are packaged as Docker containers, allowing them to be started on the host machine without additional orchestration infrastructure. Thus the deployment is on‑premise/edge, container‑based, with storage provided by the local TimescaleDB instance and compute supplied by the host PC. No cloud platforms, scalability mechanisms, or high‑availability features are described."
]
